textPlain: An audacity fork. Reason for forking described at https://tenacityaudio.org/docs/_content/Introduction_and_Mot... . Their own summary:> at the primary reasons were attempts at adding telemetry and a new desktop privacy policy [by the new audacity maintainers]Previously discussed at https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=34835200

If you're curious about the legacy link being a 404, the correct link seems to be that:
https://tenacityaudio.org/legacy/legacy.html(found sniffing around https://codeberg.org/tenacityteam/tenacityaudio.org , this 404 was reported on IRC)
